nasb.text: Our pursuers were swifter Than the eagles of the sky; They chased us on the mountains, They waited in ambush for us in the wilderness.

esv.text: Our pursuers were swifter than the eagles in the heavens; they chased us on the mountains; they lay in wait for us in the wilderness.

cnv.text: 追趕我們的比空中的鷹還快； 他們在山上追趕我們，在曠野埋伏攻擊我們。

ccb.text: 追赶我们的人比飞鹰更快， 他们在山上追捕我们， 在旷野伏击我们。
